title: anisopappus chinensis var. rupestris
intro: Anisopappus chinensis var. rupestris, also known as the mountain false asphodel, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family. This plant has been traditionally used in Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities, which make it effective in treating various health issues. The mountain false asphodel has been found to have numerous health benefits, such as lowering blood pressure, reducing fever, and alleviating respiratory problems, as well as possessing antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. It is commonly prepared as an herbal infusion or decoction for medicinal purposes, and its dried roots and rhizomes are used in traditional Chinese medicine to treat a range of ailments.
